name: BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers
notes: Edit this BB to define typical database servers. This BB is used in conjunction with the BB:FalsePositive: Database Server False Positive Categories and BB:FalsePositive: Database Server False Positive Events building blocks.
bb_references: BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Database Ports
when the destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
